response:
Sec. 1  
In 2019, the Chief Minister of Andhra Pradesh was Chandrababu Naidu. He belonged to the Telugu Desam Party. His leadership was marked by economic reforms and infrastructure development.

Sec. 2  
Andhra Pradesh government under Chandrababu Naidu focused on improving infrastructure and technology.  
***
Andhra Pradesh chief minister Chandrababu Naidu led the state with a clear vision.  
***
He prioritized development projects and industrial growth in the state.  
***
His government implemented policies to attract investments and create jobs.  
***
Chandrababu Naidu's tenure saw significant progress in education and healthcare.  
***
He maintained a strong political stance and navigated various challenges.  
***
The people of Andhra Pradesh supported his leadership during his term.  
***
His efforts in governance were recognized both nationally and internationally.
